title: nelsonia vestita
intro: Nelsonia vestita is a flowering plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family, native to the tropical regions of India and Southeast Asia. It is also known as Indian pennywort or Blue Plectranthus, and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Nelsonia vestita include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems, such as diarrhea and nausea. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
